chapter_title.en: Chapter on Performing ʿumrah During the Months of Hajj

text: 2938 - وَ رَوَى عُمَرُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «مَنِ اِعْتَمَرَ عُمْرَةً مُفْرَدَةً فَلَهُ أَنْ يَخْرُجَ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ مَتَى شَاءَ إِلاَّ أَنْ يُدْرِكَهُ خُرُوجُ اَلنَّاسِ يَوْمَ اَلتَّرْوِيَةِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2938 - Umar ibn Yazid narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Whoever performs an independent Umrah (Umrah Mufradah) may return to their family whenever they wish, unless they are still present when the people set out on the Day of Tarwiyah (8th of Dhu al-Hijjah)."
